zh.Moncreiffe, Perthshire, Scotland, United: 英國蘇格蘭培爾蒙可福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk於1409年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk19歲，母親Katherine Murray16歲。他於1440年與Beatrix de Dundas在蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年10月26日在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年66歲。

zh-hans.Moncreiffe, Perthshire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰培爾蒙可福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk于1409年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk19岁，母亲Katherine Murray16岁。他于1440年与Beatrix de Dundas在苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年10月26日在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moncrieff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Moncrief  . This is the more common form in Scotland.

variants.name: Moncrieffe
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Moncrieff  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Jamaica.

variants.name: Moncrief
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moncreiffe in Dunbarney (Perthshire). The placename derives from Gaelic monadh ‘hill’ + craoibhe, genitive of craobh ‘tree’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk was born in 1409, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk, was 19 and his mother, Katherine Murray, was 16. He married Beatrix de Dundas in 1440, in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 October 1475, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk est né en 1409, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Katherine Murray, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Dundas en 1440, à Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1475, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk 1409 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk 19 und seine Mutter Katherine Murray 16. Er hat 1440 in Perthshire, Scotland Beatrix de Dundas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1475 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk è nato il nel 1409 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Murray, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Dundas nel 1440, nel Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1475, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilkが1409年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilkは19歳，母Katherine Murrayは16歳であった。1440年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアでBeatrix de Dundasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年10月26日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk(이)가 1409년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Murray(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1440년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Beatrix de Dundas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 10월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk nasceu em 1409, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Murray, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Dundas em 1440, em Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1475, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk родился в 1409 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm De Moncrieffe 6th Lord Of That Ilk было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Murray, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Dundas в 1440 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 октября 1475 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
